Haryana Staff Selection Commission HSSC Primary Teacher PRT Mewat Cadre Under Advt. No. 05/2024 Notification 2024. Those candidates who are interested in this Haryana HSSC Primary Teacher PRT Vacancy 2024 can Download Admit Card. Read the notification for recruitment eligibility, post information, selection procedure, Practice Test, pay scale and all other information.
Haryana Staff Selection Commission (HSSC) Haryana HSSC Primary Teacher PRT Online Form 2024 HSSC Primary Teacher Advt. No. 05/2024 Exam | Short Details of Notification WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM

Important Dates Application Begin : 12/08/2024 Last Date for Apply Online : 21/08/2024 Last Date Fee Payment : 23/08/2024 Exam Date : 28/09/2024 Admit Card Available : Before Exam Result Available : 24/07/2026

Application Fee Male Candidates : General / EWS / Other State : 150/- Haryana Reserve Category : 35/- Female Candidates : General / EWS (Haryana) : 75/- Haryana Reserve Category : 18/- Payment Mode : Pay the Exam Fees Through Online / Offline Mode Only.

Haryana HSSC Primary Teacher Notification 2024 : Age Limit Details 2024 Minimum Age : 18 Years. Maximum Age : 42 Years. Age Relaxation Extra as per HSSC  Primary Teacher PRT 2024 Exam  Recruitment Rules.
HSSC Primary Teacher Recruitment 2024 : Vacancy Details Total : 1456 Post

10+2 with 50% Marks and 2 Year Diploma in Elementary Education OR 10+2 with 45% Marks and 2 Year Diploma in Elementary Education as per NCTE Norms 2002 OR 10+2 with 50% Marks and 4 Year Bachelor of Elementary Education Course (B.El.Ed) OR Bachelor Degree (BA, B.Com, B.SC) with 2 Year Diploma in Elementary Education (DELED / BTC) HTET / STET Certificate. Hindi / Sanskrit Subject in Matric Level.

HSSC Primary Teacher PRT Exam 2024 : Category Wise Vacancy Details General : 607 Post, EWS : 71 Post, SC : 300 Post, BCA : 242 Post, BCB : 170 Post , EWS General : 50 Post , ESM SC : 06 Post , ESM BCA : 05 Post , ESM BCB : 50 Post | Total : 1456 Post

How to Fill Haryana HSSC Primary Teacher PRT Online Form 2024 Haryana Staff Selection Commission HSSC Primary Teacher PRT Recruitment 2024. Candidate Can Apply Between 12/08/2024 to 21/08/2024 . Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in  HSSC Primary Teacher PRT Exam 2024. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
Interested Candidates Can Read the Full HSSC Primary Teacher Jobs 2024 Notification before Apply Online.
